case_title: S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC. VS. DEIDRE E ENGLISH

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,253.05 FILED BY S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLISH, DEIDRE E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-22-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-02-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLISH, DEIDRE E

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2010 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ENGLISH, DEIDRE E

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F. TOWN TAXI, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENGLISH, DEIDRE E $950.78 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,055.78, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1901.55 AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO EACH PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-03-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
